message:
feat(vc_cli): wire TUI launch through run_with_options, add --inline flag

- Commands::Tui gains --inline flag for below-prompt rendering
- TTY guard: reject non-interactive stdin/stdout with clear error message
- load_config() helper replaces duplicated config discovery logic
- resolve_tui_options() maps VcConfig + --inline flag to vc_tui::RunOptions
- TuiError variant added to CliError for vc_tui error propagation
- robot_machines_inventory() extracted from RobotCommands::Machines handler
  with graceful fallback to config-derived machine list when store unavailable
- Import cleanup: std::io::IsTerminal, vc_collect::machine::{Machine, MachineStatus}

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
